sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102940" key="teleiwth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελει-ωτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n102940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accomplisher, finisher</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς πίστεως</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg019.perseus-grc1:12:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Hebr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
